content:
The Market was too tough to get money because volatility was high. There was so much up and down. KOSDAQ value ended as -4.49% and KOSPI value has -1.41% on Feb.
So many opinion were there with the reason why the market had too much volatility. Someone said inflation would come, others said this was just temporary.
 As a result, I don’t know exactly which one would be right but there was no evidence to stop my strategies in my opinion. There was no differences between the test and the real. There was no critical decreases in my standard.
 From Feb, I operated 4 strategies as I said. To operate many strategies, I put more money to the stock so the stock has become many percentage in my assets. Below table shows my current proportions of private assets.
   Stock Cryto Currencies IRP KASA     0.63 0.29 0.06 0.02    Most of them, they beat the market value but momentum strategy under-performed about -1%p. In genport community, many genporters who had momentum strategy got in troubles with losing some money. Many genporters move to swing, quant strategies because they said momentum strategy did not work in these days. But I made some tiny modification to my momentum strategy and I will keep going to operate mine.
 In summary I got 1.76% earning on Feb. Even it was too tough but I beat the market benchmark in total.
  And this is my total summary from 2021. New start has become in Feb because of increasing money.
summary:
The Market was too tough to get money because volatility was high. There was so much up and down. KOSDAQ value ended as -4.49% and KOSPI value has -1.41% on Feb.
So many opinion were there with the reason why the market had too much volatility. Someone said inflation would come, others said this was just temporary.
 As a result, I don’t know exactly which one would be right but there was no evidence to stop my strategies in my opinion.
title: Monthly Report Feb 2021

content:
This is my first report on 2021. I really satisfied that my strategy beat KOSPI1.
 From the report on Feb 2021, more detailed analysis would be posted because the number of strategies extended 4.
 It gave me very good performence about 6% in a month. Beginner’s luck was applied to me.
   High Close MDD     9.53% 5.87% 3.05%      KOSPI is Korea benchmark like S&P 500. ↩︎

title: Monthly Report Jan 2021

content:
The reason why I started system trading with GenPort1platform was to develope my skills as learning other things.
 Ironically, however, now I have been focusing to learn how to do this better. Of course, I can post any other things about computer security, programming skills and IT Tech, etc.
 But for now, I think I would post this kind of things quite some times.
This is an overview for monthly report of my stock asset.
 Now I am managing various assets in many ways. Stock, Crypto currencies, IRP(Individual Retirement Plan) account, KASA2platform (small scalized real estate). In monthly reports, I would post only the change of my stock asset and proportions of each values.
 In the end of the year, I will summarize that all. The below table shows the current proportions of each values.
   Stock Cryto Currencies IRP KASA     0.32 0.46 0.16 0.06    I started system trading on Jan, 2021. At that time, I ran just one strategy is quant. Now I am running 4 strategy.
 1 quant 1 deep 1 momentum 1 quant for small market-cap  I would show the report monthly and explain each strategy step by step. I hope that it works for me.
  GenPort plaform : https://genport.newsystock.com/Main.aspx ↩︎
 KASA : https://www.kasa.co.kr/ ↩︎
